changeSet.author: reagan-meant
changeSet.comment: Create uom_type_map table to map UOMs to usage types

changeSet.author: reagan-meant
changeSet.comment: Migrate existing uom_type values to the mapping table
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.uom_type_map (id, uom_id, uom_type, lastupdated) SELECT nextval('clinlims.uom_type_map_seq'), id, uom_type, NOW() FROM clinlims.unit_of_measure WHERE uom_type IS NOT NULL AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM clinlims.uom_type_map m WHERE m.uom_id = unit_of_measure.id AND m.uom_type = unit_of_measure.uom_type )

changeSet.author: reagan-meant

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.uom_type_map m JOIN clinlims.unit_of_measure u ON m.uom_id = u.id WHERE u.name = 'mL' AND m.uom_type = 'SAMPLE_COLLECTION'

changeSet.comment: Map mL to SAMPLE_COLLECTION type (reusing existing mL UOM if it exists)
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.uom_type_map (id, uom_id, uom_type, lastupdated) SELECT nextval('clinlims.uom_type_map_seq'), id, 'SAMPLE_COLLECTION', NOW() FROM clinlims.unit_of_measure WHERE name = 'mL' LIMIT 1

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.unit_of_measure WHERE name = 'tubes'

changeSet.author: reagan-meant

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.uom_type_map m JOIN clinlims.unit_of_measure u ON m.uom_id = u.id WHERE u.name = 'tubes' AND m.uom_type = 'SAMPLE_COLLECTION'

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.uom_type_map (id, uom_id, uom_type, lastupdated) SELECT nextval('clinlims.uom_type_map_seq'), id, 'SAMPLE_COLLECTION', NOW() FROM clinlims.unit_of_measure WHERE name = 'tubes'

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.unit_of_measure WHERE name = 'slides'

changeSet.author: reagan-meant

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.uom_type_map m JOIN clinlims.unit_of_measure u ON m.uom_id = u.id WHERE u.name = 'slides' AND m.uom_type = 'SAMPLE_COLLECTION'

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.uom_type_map (id, uom_id, uom_type, lastupdated) SELECT nextval('clinlims.uom_type_map_seq'), id, 'SAMPLE_COLLECTION', NOW() FROM clinlims.unit_of_measure WHERE name = 'slides'
